validate.notes: Fixed solve.sh to properly apply the gold patch. Key fixes: (1) Used base64 encoding to avoid heredoc escaping issues when creating create-migration.js, (2) Created symlink from ghost/core/node_modules/semver to npm's built-in semver at /usr/local/lib/node_modules/npm/node_modules/semver, (3) Fixed package.json update to use node script instead of patch. All 12 tests pass with gold reward=1. NOP reward=0 as expected (script doesn't exist on base). Rubric judge has API auth issues (401) but manual verification confirms all rules pass: SKILL.md updated with yarn migrate:create, no slimer reference, RC bump documented, package.json has migrate:create script, create-migration.js follows conventions.
